mapper.select: SELECT order_id, user_id, total_amount, address_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{value} ORDER BY order_id DESC
SELECT order_id, user_id, total_amount, address_id, status, created_at, updated_at FROM orders WHERE order_id = #{value}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders ( user_id, total_amount, address_id, status ) VALUES ( #{user_id}, #{total_amount}, #{address_id}, 'PENDING' )
INSERT INTO order_items ( order_id, product_id, price, quantity ) VALUES ( #{order_id}, #{product_id}, #{price}, #{quantity} )
mapper.select: SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, oi.price, oi.quantity, p.name AS productName, p.image_s AS imageS, (oi.price * oi.quantity) AS subtotalAmount FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{value}
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{order_id}
UPDATE orders SET status = #{status}, cancel_reason = #{cancel_reason}, cancelled_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE order_id = #{order_id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'PENDING' THEN 1 END) AS pendingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'PAID' THEN 1 END) AS paidCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'PREPARING' THEN 1 END) AS preparingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'SHIPPING' THEN 1 END) AS shippingCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'DELIVERED' THEN 1 END) AS deliveredCount, COUNT(CASE WHEN status = 'CANCELLED' THEN 1 END) AS cancelCount FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT oi.order_item_id, oi.order_id, oi.product_id, p.name AS productName, p.image_s AS imageS, oi.quantity, oi.price FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id WHERE oi.order_id = #{order_id} ORDER BY oi.order_item_id ASC
